text: We investigate voting patterns in congressional elections using demographic and economic indicators.
We develop a Bayesian model for predicting hospital readmission rates and health outcomes.
We study climate change impacts on agricultural productivity and environmental sustainability.
We propose a machine learning approach for medical image segmentation.
We examine the relationship between air pollution and respiratory health.
We analyze public attitudes toward environmental policy using survey data.
We develop statistical methods for genomic data and machine learning.
We investigate machine learning techniques for climate forecasting and environmental prediction.
